case_title: FRONTIER INSURANCE COMPANY IN REHABILITATION VS. B.I.M. INSURANCE MARKETING, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRONTIER INSURANCE COMPANY IN REHABILITATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B.I.M. INSURANCE MARKETING, INC. $183,247.25 PRINCIPAL, $15,950.04 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $199,489.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT B.I.M. INSURANCE MARKETING, INC.
